author: Sajith Tharaka P.
pros: With comparing to other providers, SMS delivery accurate is very high. All SMS will be deliverred to my customers. And easy to use everything with userfriendly dashboard.
cons: No instant funds add option. Every paypal payments will be approved manually by staff. But within 1-2 days payment will be approved. It is better if you can set it instant.

description: As a business we use a lot of communication methods, but we feel a text message achieves the best results
author: Sammy K.
pros: We can copy and paste telephone numbers from a spread sheet straight into MessageBird to avoid manual update
cons: I like everything about it - I had a problem with finding my saved templates when the system was updated - but that was my own failure to look properly

description: Really poor. They hide prices, they charge more than advertised and the blocked the services with no prior notice nor explanation, exposing us to huge contingencies.
author: Facundo T.
pros: Nothing. The service is average the customer service the worst I had ever try.
cons: They blocked our account with no prior notice or explanation, we lost all the services connected and generated a huge problem for our services and to all our customers

description: Very polite customer service, very easy to deal with. Very pleased after moving away from our previous provider.
author: Chris S.
pros: Fantastic pricing when purchasing in bulk with a very easy to use interface. Reporting is excellent and it's easy to find out the status of messages sent.
cons: Perhaps provide more 'plugins' to various different pieces of software to widen availability.

description: So far so good!
author: Lindsay H.
pros: I consult for multiple businesses across multiply countries, and was looking for a single platform that can accommodate a local / personal feel for our customer communications. So far, MessageBird seems to be ticking all of the boxes as we can message our US customers from our US number, Canadian with Canadian number, etc. In addition, the platform dashboard is very easy to manage, so opening this option up to teammates that are less tech savvy will be an option
cons: it would be nice to have a local customer service number in all countries where you have offices, so that we can speak to someone (if needed) without paying international phone rates. I use the chat functionality, and they were fairly responsive. Once someone did connect with me, she stuck with me through all questions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Been using them since they started, very happy!
author: Ivor B.
pros: Automatic invoices on low credit, simple API
cons: Nothing, using it for over a decade and never had issues

review_title: Refund not processed for the last 1 month.
description: Not happy with the response. Our 600$ is still stuck with them. They haven't refunded the amount at all.
author: Shreekala K.
pros: I am putting this review after a lot of frustration that we have gone through using this product. In the beginning, before the sale, the support team responded with 2-3 hours . After we bought the product - we went through 3 weeks of back and forth as we were facing issues with receiving the message. This was also the time we were launching a major campaign and we really needed help.
cons: Tech support is really bad and very very slow and it took us 3 weeks to finally decide we cannot work with this kind of support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Send and receive messages daily. Great standard.
description: We use Messagebird on a daily basis to send and receive texts to hundreds of clients. Get service, would strongly recommend.
author: Luke R.
pros: Easy to use and fantastic customer support
cons: Can sometimes take a while for funds to be added to account.

description: excellent
author: Sander H.
pros: Easy to use SMS gateway, i'm using it for several clients. The API is simple and MessageBird is an cool company from Amsterdam
cons: sometimes there is an delay in delivery the txt message (SMS)

description: We can now offer our customers quick resetting or OTP options. It makes a login or reset process a whole lot easier.
author: Pascal B.
pros: We likes the text messaging function the most. They have a great API which makes it easy to automate any process. Want a password reset? No problem? OTP’s? You can make it.
cons: The documentation can be a little unclear. However, their flexible SDKs make up for it.

description: Overall experience is great but the price is quite high, for example for a small company or small business.
author: Olga T.
pros: Fast service that helps you to manage your business fast.
cons: The cost may be recognized as the pretty high for a small business.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: jamieal J.
pros: what i like most about this software is the messaging and the way the software is set up
cons: software is great nothing is need to be improve at this time

review_title: Excellent Progressive Solution with amazing customer support.
description: I am very impressed, when researching a good solution for my client and looking for reviews, some suggested Messagebird had bad customer support, however my experience has been the opposite. The y have been sensational with their support in all cases. We had trouble getting our Facebook business verified and their customer support went out of their way to try and help. Just generally very impressed.
author: Gary L.
pros: It offers more integratable channels than any other I have seen. The inbox feature for conversations is great and to be able to add non customer visible notes mid chat stream is a great feature. They seem to e a progressive company and not stale in there feature developments. API in my opinion seems pretty solid
cons: Not much really apart from a few improvables in the UI, but they seem to be progressive with.

description: Perfect solution
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and a perfect solution for Text communication.
cons: I have nothing to mention.
author_profession: Time IT laat organisaties 48% kosten besparen bij implementaties en vooraf risico¿s elimineren.

review_title: MessageBird is a decent alternative to Twilio
author: Paul T.
pros: We had much better rates than with Twilio for sending SMS messages to our users.
cons: It wasn't a drop-in replacement. And we had some issues in discovering equivalent features. Ultimately GatewayAPI gave us even better rates.

review_title: Suspending accounts and don't giving refund
description: Very bad recently after using them for +2years
author: Achraf K.
pros: terrible service, left without access to my account ! can't recieve sms , lost money and timethey shut us down without any refunds and with funds frozen
cons: Lack of transparency and frozen assets without clarification

description: Their product works, it's easy to understand and their service is is amazing! Awesome people working there.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and integrates into so many other tools our there via their Zapier and Webhooks functions.
cons: Not anything at all, they have a great product.

description: Good. We switched from twilio to mb and we're happy with the change, it was an improvement.
author: Ruben V.
pros: Easy api implementation Competitive prices Text to voice solution is awesome
cons: Development api cannot track or debug on dashboard. Difficult for our continuos integration because new features like the new text to voice implementation we won't be sure they work until we go live on production Have been paying twice because of unicoide and plain formats but that was difficult to see because on dashboard appears always 1 message, should indicate something like 2 credits

review_title: Simple way to communicate with field staff
description: Message bird makes communicating with a field team who don't have company email simple and quick. Very easily created a reminder system using the API to send texts to field staff about upcoming work from internal system
author: Mike S.
pros: Ease of use - simple setup Used by a team with technical expertise Easily to create and manage contacts and groups Responsive support team Good value
cons: Nothing in particular

author: Justus N.
pros: The price for the quality of product is pretty amazing. We get 99.9% of our texts instantly. We refill our credit for about $50 every 6 months. We added additional security to our network for pennies.
cons: The customer service can often be slow. You have to rely on text-based chat since it is located in Amsterdam. The customer service reps are always very polite and informational, but the wait (especially during critical downtime) can be excruciating.

review_title: Thumbs up, from small business owner.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great service, never any issues. All messages get delivered quickly and reliably.
cons: The Support is very good so if you have any problems they always get back to you in a matter of minutes

review_title: Messagebird is very stable and easy to use
description: We use SMS as voicemail notification service to our customers that expects real time delivery with very good results via Messagebird
author: Mike R.
pros: Very easy to connect the SMS service to our applications Stable service level on SMS delivery
cons: No cons at the moment about Messagebird.

review_title: This is for the large companies out there, but not for the little man right here
description: I think this software is good for large companies looking to have support numbers, but as an individual, there is much better offers out there.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It’s simple and neat looking. It allows easy integration that just becomes downright convenient.
cons: It can sometimes be unavailable in some countries. The pricing can be unclear at times
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Brilliant messaging service for my small business
description: Great software and happy to recommend to all friends and work colleagues to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use for day-to-day messaging tasks - my customers love receiving booking confimations via text rather than email.
cons: None really - once you get the hang of it the software is pretty straight forward.

description: Our system is used for further education admissions in order remind students about interviews and the application process.
author: Ash R.
pros: Easy to set up and useful reporting facilities compared to other providers. The per message cost was lower than other providers.
cons: I really can't think of any cons as our experience has been faultless.
